Class GraphConfiguration

java.lang.Object
io.graphite.builder.GraphConfiguration
public final class GraphConfiguration extends Object
Stores configuration options used during graph generation.

GraphConfiguration centralizes all generation parameters used by graph builders and generators, including graph type, vertex count, edge count, weight configuration, connectivity requirements, and graph constraints.

Instances of this class are populated by builder implementations and consumed by graph generators during graph construction.

Since:
2.0
Version:
2.0
Author:
Chinmay
See Also:

  • RandomGraphGenerator
  • GraphFactory
